lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖੁ ਸਰਣਿ ਜਗਦੀਸੁਰ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਮੋਹਿ ਸਰਧਾ ਪੂਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: raakh saran jagadeesur piaare mohi saradhaa poor har gusaaee |
lines.english: Keep me under Your Protection, O Beloved Master of the Universe; fulfill my faith, O Lord of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਅਨਦੁ ਹੋਤ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਨਿਮਖ ਦਿਖਾਈ ॥੨॥੩੯॥੧੩॥੧੫॥੬੭॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kai man anad hot hai har darasan nimakh dikhaaee |2|39|13|15|67|
lines.english: Servant Nanak's mind is filled with bliss, when he beholds the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan, even for an instant. ||2||39||13||15||67||
Raag Aasaa, Second House, Fifth Mehl:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਲਾਈ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਸੋਈ ਫਿਰਿ ਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin laaee preet soee fir khaaeaa |
lines.english: One who loves her, is ultimately devoured.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸੁਖਿ ਬੈਠਾਲੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਉ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin sukh baitthaalee tis bhau bahut dikhaaeaa |
lines.english: One who seats her in comfort, is totally terrified by her.
Siblings, friends and family, beholding her, argue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਿਕ ਸਿਧ ਸੁਰਦੇਵ ਮਨੁਖਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਸਭਿ ਧ੍ਰੋਹਨਿ ਧ੍ਰੋਹੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saadhik sidh suradev manukhaa bin saadhoo sabh dhrohan dhrohe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: the strivers, the Siddhas, the demi-gods, angels and mortals. All, except the Saadhus, are deceived by her deception. ||1||Pause||
But she has come under my control, by Guru's Grace. ||1||
Beholding her, all are bewitched:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਉਦਾਸੀ ਤਿਨੑ ਕਾਮਿ ਵਿਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: eik fireh udaasee tina kaam viaapai |
lines.english: Some wander around as renunciates, but they are engrossed in sexual desire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਸੰਚਹਿ ਗਿਰਹੀ ਤਿਨੑ ਹੋਇ ਨ ਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: eik sancheh girahee tina hoe na aapai |
lines.english: Some grow rich as householders, but she does not belong to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਲਗਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ham har raakhe lag satigur paavai |2|
lines.english: The Lord has saved me, by attaching me to the Feet of the True Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਸਤੀ ਕਹਾਵਹਿ ਤਿਨੑ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਕਲਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: eik satee kahaaveh tina bahut kalapaavai |
lines.english: Some call themselves men of charity, and she torments them terribly.
She leads astray the penitents who practice penance.
The world of the three qualities is enticed, and the heavens are enticed.
The scholarly Pandits are all seduced by greed.
She is the slave of those who are spiritually wise.
With her palms pressed together, she serves them and offers her prayer:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਰਾਖੇ ਦੇ ਕਰਿ ਹਾਥੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ham satigur raakhe de kar haath |3|
lines.english: The True Guru has saved me, by giving me His Hand. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵਾ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak guramukh nerr na aavaa |4|1|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, she does not draw near to the Gurmukh. ||4||1||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੂੰ ਕਹਹਿ ਸੁ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo toon kaheh su kaar kamaavaa |
lines.english: "Whatever you wish, that is what I shall do."
I have been separated from my Beloved by Maya (my mother-in-law).
I am protected by my All-knowing, Wise Husband Lord. ||1||
Hope and desire (my younger brother-in-law and sister-in-law) are dying of grief.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਕੇ ਜਿਠੇਰੇ ਕੀ ਚੂਕੀ ਕਾਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: ghar ke jitthere kee chookee kaan |
lines.english: I am no longer swayed by the fear of Death (my elder brother-in-law).

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨਹੁ ਲੋਕਾ ਮੈ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sunahu lokaa mai prem ras paaeaa |
lines.english: Listen, O people: I have tasted the elixir of love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਜਨ ਮਾਰੇ ਵੈਰੀ ਸੰਘਾਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦਿਵਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: durajan maare vairee sanghaare satigur mo kau har naam divaaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The evil ones are dead, and my enemies are destroyed. The True Guru has given me the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
Second, I renounced the ways of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਦੁਰਜਨ ਮੀਤ ਸਮਾਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun tiaag durajan meet samaane |
lines.english: Renouncing the three qualities, I look alike upon friend and enemy.
First, I renounced my egotistical love of myself.
And then, the fourth state of bliss was revealed to me by the Holy One. ||2||
In the cave of celestial bliss, I have obtained a seat.
The Lord of Light plays the unstruck melody of bliss.
I am in ecstasy, contemplating the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਸਿਉ ਰਾਤੀ ਧਨ ਸੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਨਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: pria siau raatee dhan sohaagan naar |3|
lines.english: Imbued with my Beloved Husband Lord, I am the blessed, happy soul-bride. ||3||
Servant Nanak chants the wisdom of God;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮਿ ਨ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: janam na marai na aavai na jaae |
lines.english: He is not born, and he does not die; he does not come or go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸੁਣੇ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਸੁ ਉਤਰੈ ਪਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo sune kamaavai su utarai paar |
lines.english: one who listens and practices it, is carried across and saved.
Her beauty is incomparable, and her character is perfect.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
He remains blended with the Lord. ||4||2||
The bride shows such special devotion, and has such an agreeable disposition.
But rare are those who, as Gurmukh, attain that state||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਵਸੈ ਸੋ ਗ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਸੋਭਾਵੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jit grihi vasai so grihu sobhaavantaa |
lines.english: The house in which she dwells is such a praiseworthy house.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਕਰਣੀ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਮ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sukaranee kaaman gur mil ham paaee |
lines.english: As the soul-bride of pure actions, I have met with the Guru.
